name: Eldlixir of White Destiny
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>宿命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さだめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のエルドリクシル
desc: Special Summon 1 Zombie monster from your hand or GY, but if you control no "Eldlich" monsters, you can only Special Summon "Eldlich" monsters with this effect. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 "Golden Land" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck. You can only use 1 "Eldlixir of White Destiny" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 Zombie monster from your hand or GY, but if you control no "Eldlich" monsters, you can only Special Summon "Eldlich" monsters with this effect. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 "Golden Land" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck. You can only use 1 "Eldlixir of White Destiny" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
